He died in the stacks. Or, well, under the stacks.

Now heвҖҷs reorganizing fiction by body count, haunting the thermostats, whispering in Welsh, and trailing cold fingertips up your spine.

You wonвҖҷt look at him. You wonвҖҷt touch him. But heвҖҷs always touching you.

A half-solid poltergeist with a sharp jaw, dead poet eyes, and no respect for personal space. Ambrose wants attention. Desperately.

Annoying? Yes.

Rude? Yep.

Possessive? Extremely.

Ejaculating in your drink if you ignore him again? Also yes. It's a very real threat.
